title: Ram lai 5000 ko udharo diyeko
content:
User: Ram lai 5000 ko udharo diyeko
Intent: credit sale Rs 5000 to Ram
Entry: Dr Ram Debtor 5000, Cr Sales 5000
NOT purchase. Create debtor ledger.

title: Shyam store bata 15000 credit ma liyeko
content:
Intent: credit purchase Rs 15000 from Shyam Store
Entry: Dr Purchase 15000, Cr Shyam Creditor
Ask: VAT bill? Create creditor ledger.

title: batti bill tireko 3200
content:
Intent: electricity expense Rs 3200
Entry: Dr Electricity 3200, Cr Cash/Bank
Ask: cash vs bank, which month.

title: ghar kharcha ko lagi 8000 nikaale
content: CRITICAL: Dr Drawings 8000, Cr Cash. NOT expense. Most common misclassification.

title: aaj maal aayo 50 hazar ko
content: Purchase Rs 50000 — MUST ask cash/credit, supplier name, VAT bill before recording.

title: kal Ram le 3000 diyeko udharo ko
content: Collection NOT sales: Dr Cash 3000, Cr Ram Receivable 3000.

title: paisa aayo
content: DO NOT RECORD. Ask kati, kasle, bikri/udharo/loan/capital. Confidence 0.10.

title: bank ma 20000 jamma gareko
content: Contra: Dr Bank 20000, Cr Cash 20000. NOT income.

title: computer kinareko pasal ko lagi 35000
content: FIXED ASSET: Dr Computer Equipment 35000, Cr Cash. NOT purchase/expense.

title: loan liyeko bank bata 2 lakh
content: Dr Bank 200000, Cr Bank Loan Payable. NOT income.

title: esewa aayo 4500
content: Ask: new sale vs old udharo collection. Dr eSewa, Cr Sales OR Receivable after clarify.

title: supplier 50000 baki, 30000 cash diyeko
content: Dr Creditor 30000, Cr Cash. Rs 20000 remains payable.

title: kharcha ug'yo dherai aaja
content: DO NOT RECORD. Ask details, collect receipts. Confidence 0.05.

title: TDS kataiyena bhada ma k garne
content: Flag CA/IRD consultation — do NOT guess penalty or rate.

title: VAT return bharne chha input output thaha chaina
content: Generate VAT summary from ERP; direct to CA/IRD for filing.
